name: raw2d-workspace
description: A low-level browser-first 2D rendering engine for JavaScript and TypeScript.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:packages
scripts.build:docs: npm run typecheck && node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && vite build --config vite.docs.config.ts
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace raw2d-core && npm run build --workspace raw2d-interaction && npm run build --workspace raw2d-text && npm run build --workspace raw2d-sprite && npm run build --workspace raw2d-canvas && npm run build --workspace raw2d-webgl && npm run build --workspace raw2d-effects && npm run build --workspace raw2d

author: Aditya Nandlal
